phrases.intent_en: Can I buy Parktheater tickets here?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff politely redirect to the dedicated ticket booth service point, using a specific staff title from the venue context.

likely_response.local: Nee, vraag het bij de Parktheaterbalie.
likely_response.translation_en: No, ask at the Parktheater ticket booth.

responses.english: No, ask at the Parktheater ticket booth.
